ci_convention.note: For thesis claims, prefer seeds>=3 and cite seed-level CI.

pooled_episode_ci.meaning: CI over all episodes pooled across seeds (bootstrap), written to eval_ci.json

seed_level_ci.meaning: CI over per-seed episode means (replicates=seeds), written to eval_ci_seed.json when seeds>=2
